Latest Projects

  • Arduino Projects

    Working through the 15 projects proposed by the Arduino Starter Kit projects book.

    I took this challenge in order to learn more about electronics, microcontrollers and circuits.

    The full list of projects done on the arduino can be found on my GitHub.

  • Docker Web Project

    Using 5+ docker containers for encrypting and decrypting with a symmetric AES key a large BMP picture. The full implementation can be found on GitHub.

  • Java Secure Applications Programming

    The full implementation can be found on GitHub.
